## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`go test ./...`) and lint/format is clean (`go vet ./...`, `gofmt`)
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] Wire-format changes keep `testdata/vectors.json` in sync with crypt-ts (cross-language parity)
- [ ] Updated docs / README / CHANGELOG for user-facing changes
- [ ] No unrelated changes or formatting churn
